title: Drew Fossum
compiled_truth: Drew Fossum is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-06), Drew Fossum sent 2137 and received 1052 emails, totalling 3189 interactions.
